summary: Attempt-1 (real openai/gpt-4o) returned doc_error=DOCUMENTATION_FAILED in 190ms with ZERO cost-ledger rows. Root cause is NOT a gpt-4o output/schema failure (the model was never called) and NOT a bridge defect. The L3 permission gate agent_budget_rule denied agent.invoke with VISION_NOT_FOUND because the freshly-seeded project had no locked vision.md. The bridge behaved CORRECTLY: fail-closed, no advance, no documentation.json written.

attempt_1_real.interpretation: documentProject -> role.invoke(documentation) -> agent.invoke DENIED (VISION_NOT_FOUND) -> role AGENT_FAILED -> bridge doc_error=DOCUMENTATION_FAILED (metadata.reason != INVALID_ROLE_OUTPUT). Mock/suite path passes because TEST mode bypasses the vision gate (TEST_MODE_ALLOWED); the real gate runs in WORKSPACE_WRITE where vision authority is enforced.

root_cause: Seed-completeness gap (harness), same class as PHASE-28's gate-script fix+rerun cycles. The gate seed did not create a locked vision.md; real pipeline projects (e.g. phase28_gate10) carry one. Without it, the L3 agent_budget_rule denies all agent.invoke calls for the project.
fix_applied: gate32_phase32_documentation.js seedLoopToDocumentation() now also writes a locked artifacts/projects/phase32_gate10/vision.md (vision_locked:true), shape mirrored from the known-good artifacts/projects/phase28_gate10/vision.md. Harness-only; engine/bridge UNCHANGED.

fix_validated_dry_mock_zero_cost.note: GATE32_DRY_MOCK=1 run — exercises the FULL real-mode path (real apiServer in WORKSPACE_WRITE, real L3 vision-authority gate) with a $0 mock documentation completion. Proves the vision gate now PASSES and the bridge advances.

bridge_assessment: CORRECT. documentProject fail-closed on a denied agent call (no advance, no write) — exactly the intended behavior. No bridge change required.
next: AWAITING CTO/owner GO to execute the SINGLE authorized real gpt-4o run (attempt-1 consumed $0 — the real completion was never made). On GO: run `node scripts/spikes/gate32_phase32_documentation.js` (no GATE32_DRY_MOCK) -> overwrites this file with the real HONEST_EVIDENCE result. If real gpt-4o output then fails OUTPUT_SCHEMA -> DOC_PARSE_FAILED, the script STOPs and reports the raw output per GO #7 (no faked PASS).
